name: IP Address
description: Copy your primary local IP address to the clipboard. Ported from the Raycast IP Address extension by thomas (MIT).

args: ip=$(ipconfig getifaddr en0 2>/dev/null || ipconfig getifaddr en1 2>/dev/null || ifconfig | awk '/inet / && !/127\.0\.0\.1/{print $2; exit}'); [ -n "$ip" ] && echo -n "$ip" | pbcopy
